sourcesContent:
import { Component, OnInit } from '@angular/core'; import { ToastService } from '../toast-service'; @Component({ selector: 'app-lineawesome', templateUrl: './lineawesome.component.html', styleUrls: ['./lineawesome.component.scss'] }) /** * Lineawesome Icon Component */ export class LineawesomeComponent implements OnInit { // bread crumb items breadCrumbItems!: Array<{}>; constructor(public toastService: ToastService) { } ngOnInit(): void { /** * BreadCrumb */ this.breadCrumbItems = [ { label: 'Icons' }, { label: 'Line Awesome', active: true } ]; } copytext(event: any) { var element = event.target.querySelector('i').className navigator.clipboard.writeText(element); this.toastService.show(element + ' icon Copied Successfully !!!', { classname: 'bg-success text-center text-white', delay: 5000 }); } }
